    N

    necklace - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.InventorIcon

    nickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.PlayerScore
    Returns the player's nickname.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.CharacterType
    Represents the absence of a character type.
    NoOpGameResultRepository - Class in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    No-op implementation used when persistence is disabled.
    notifyNotification(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Broadcasts a non-state-critical message to all subscribed views.
